Features

Everything You Need for Safety Compliance

From voice-based reporting to automated compliance checks, we've got you covered.

Conversational AI

Natural language understanding extracts all required fields from casual conversations.

Voice Transcription

Accurate voice-to-text in 14+ languages. Perfect for hands-free reporting in the field.

Auto-Generated Reports

Structured, audit-ready reports created automatically from conversations.

Real-time Analytics

Live dashboards showing safety trends, incident patterns, and compliance metrics.

Immutable Audit Trail

Hash-chain verified records ensure data integrity for regulatory audits.

Multi-language Support

Report in Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, and more. AI translates to English for records.

How It Works

Report in 3 Simple Steps

No training needed. Just talk naturally and let AI do the rest.

01

Start a Conversation

Open the app and simply describe what happened in your own words - text or voice.

02

AI Extracts Details

Our AI understands context and asks follow-up questions to capture all required information.

03

Review & Submit

Preview the structured report, make any edits, and submit with one tap.

Report Types

Comprehensive Safety Coverage

All major HSE report types supported out of the box.

Near Miss

Incidents

Spill Reports

Inspections

Toolbox Talks

Daily Logs

Enterprise Ready

Built for Audit-Grade Compliance

Every report is timestamped, immutable, and cryptographically verified. Meet regulatory requirements with confidence.

  • Immutable audit trail with hash-chain verification
  • Role-based access control (RBAC)
  • Data encryption at rest and in transit
  • Automated backup and disaster recovery
  • GDPR, SOC 2, and ISO 27001 compliant

100%

Data Integrity

A+

Audit Score

99.8%

Compliance Rate

<1s

Response Time

Join 100+ oil & gas sites using Xappy for compliance-grade safety reporting.

AI-powered safety reporting for Oil & Gas operations. Recording only. Never makes safety decisions.
